hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】从初创公司到 1.8 万亿美元：抓住 SpaceX 机会的投资者现在获得了回报；【FINANCE】尽管通胀担忧加剧，金价仍跌至 6 个月低点。这就是金条失宠的原因；【WORLD】美国司法部批准华纳兄弟以 1110 亿美元出售给派拉蒙。

items.title: From startup to $1.8 trillion: The investors who took a chance on SpaceX now reap the rewards
items.summary: With SpaceX seeking an IPO valuation of nearly $1.8 trillion, early bets are poised to generate some of the biggest paper gains in venture capital history.
items.title_zh: 从初创公司到 1.8 万亿美元：抓住 SpaceX 机会的投资者现在获得了回报
items.summary_zh: 随着 SpaceX 寻求近 1.8 万亿美元的 IPO 估值，早期押注有望创造风险投资历史上最大的账面收益。

items.title: Gold slumps to 6-month low even as inflation fears rise. Here's why bullion is out of favor
items.summary: The yellow metal is at its lowest level of the year as potential interest rate increases and faltering technical signals weigh on prices.
items.title_zh: 尽管通胀担忧加剧，金价仍跌至 6 个月低点。这就是金条失宠的原因
items.summary_zh: 由于潜在利率上升和技术信号不稳定对价格造成压力，黄金正处于今年的最低水平。

items.title: Warner Bros $111bn sale to Paramount approved by US justice department
items.summary: The approval marks a key development in the merger that will reshape media, allowing the continue of the takeover of the Hollywood studio, which owns CNN and HBO.
items.title_zh: 美国司法部批准华纳兄弟以 1110 亿美元出售给派拉蒙
items.summary_zh: 此次批准标志着此次合并的一项关键进展，该合并将重塑媒体格局，从而允许继续收购拥有 CNN 和 HBO 的好莱坞工作室。

items.title: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
items.summary: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.
items.title_zh: BBVA 通过 OpenAI 将人工智能置于银行业的核心
items.summary_zh: 了解 BBVA 如何将 ChatGPT Enterprise 扩展到 100,000 名员工，并与 OpenAI 合作，加速全球人工智能驱动的银行业转型。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Mediator Says Peace Deal Could be Finalized Within 24 Hours
items.summary: The prime minister of Pakistan, a key intermediary between the U.S. and Iran, said a deal was “likely expected.” Officials on each side have also expressed optimism, but it still could be derailed.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：调解员表示和平协议可能在 24 小时内敲定
items.summary_zh: 巴基斯坦总理是美国和伊朗之间的重要中间人，他表示“很可能会达成协议”。双方官员也都表达了乐观态度，但仍有可能脱轨。

items.title: Bitcoin steadies above $63,000 as its worst week in months got a late macro rescue
items.summary: A tiny Strategy sale raised a bigger question about Saylor’s never-sell stance, while easing Iran fears and a strong SpaceX debut helped risk assets recover.
items.title_zh: 比特币稳定在 63,000 美元以上，这是几个月来最糟糕的一周，得到了后期的宏观救援
items.summary_zh: Strategy 的小规模出售引发了人们对 Saylor 永不出售立场的更大质疑，同时缓解了伊朗的担忧以及 SpaceX 的强势亮相，帮助风险资产复苏。

items.title: Exodus, Ondo launch tokenized markets with 200-plus stocks and ETFs on Solana
items.summary: Exodus partnered with Ondo on to launch tokenized trading of 200+ stocks and ETFs directly on the Solana blockchain.
items.title_zh: Exodus 和 Ondo 在 Solana 上推出包含 200 多种股票和 ETF 的代币化市场
items.summary_zh: Exodus 与 Ondo 合作，直接在 Solana 区块链上推出 200 多种股票和 ETF 的代币化交易。

items.title: US spot Bitcoin ETFs set to hit $2 trillion cumulative trading volume milestone amid mounting outflows
items.summary: BlackRock's IBIT dominates spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds by trading volume, with a current 73.7% market share.
items.title_zh: 在资金流出不断增加的情况下，美国现货比特币 ETF 累计交易量将达到 2 万亿美元里程碑
items.summary_zh: 按交易量计算，贝莱德的 IBIT 在现货比特币交易所交易基金中占据主导地位，目前市场份额为 73.7%。

items.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning
items.summary: Preply uses OpenAI to launch AI-generated lesson summaries, providing personalised feedback and language learning exercises.
items.title_zh: Preply 如何结合人工智能和真人导师来实现个性化学习
items.summary_zh: Preply 使用 OpenAI 推出人工智能生成的课程摘要，提供个性化反馈和语言学习练习。

items.title: When it comes to predicting people’s preferences, it pays to consider “the power of three”
items.summary: MIT researchers provide a major upgrade to the nearly century-old idea of random utility models.
items.title_zh: 在预测人们的偏好时，考虑“三者的力量”是值得的
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员对近百年历史的随机效用模型理念进行了重大升级。

items.title: KKR says AI productivity boom to keep on going — but warns of 'extreme' trend not seen since the 19th century
items.summary: KKR said in its mid-year outlook Thursday that AI will drive economic growth for years to come, but only in specific sectors.
items.title_zh: KKR 表示人工智能生产力繁荣将持续下去，但警告称，可能会出现 19 世纪以来从未出现过的“极端”趋势
items.summary_zh: KKR 在周四的年中展望中表示，人工智能将在未来几年推动经济增长，但仅限于特定领域。

items.title: Citigroup shares outperform down market after Trump endorsement
items.summary: Jane Fraser-led Citi fell 1%, less than the rest of the market and some other major banks, after Trump lauded its turnaround in a social media post.
items.title_zh: 特朗普支持后，花旗集团股价跑赢下跌市场
items.summary_zh: 在特朗普在社交媒体帖子中赞扬花旗集团的转变后，简·弗雷泽领导的花旗集团股价下跌 1%，跌幅低于市场其他股票和其他一些主要银行。

items.title: Regulators' proposed prediction markets rules ban trading on terrorism, assassinations
items.summary: The proposed rules from the commission will now face a public comment period.
items.title_zh: 监管机构提议的预测市场规则禁止恐怖主义、暗杀交易
items.summary_zh: 该委员会拟议的规则现在将面临公众意见征询期。

items.title: Israel carries out air strikes on Lebanon, state media says, as Iran claims deal with US near
items.summary: The strikes come as Iran's foreign minister says a deal to end fighting with the US is close.
items.title_zh: 官方媒体称，以色列对黎巴嫩进行空袭，伊朗声称与美国即将达成协议
items.summary_zh: 此次袭击发生之际，伊朗外交部长表示，结束与美国战斗的协议即将达成。

items.title: Married at First Sight Australia stars not told partners had drug and violence convictions
items.summary: Stars of the hit TV show say they did not know their on-screen husbands had previous convictions.
items.title_zh: 一见钟情的澳大利亚明星没有被告知伴侣有毒品和暴力犯罪记录
items.summary_zh: 这部热门电视节目的明星们表示，他们不知道自己的银幕丈夫有过前科。

items.title: Anthropic suspends new AI tools over US government security concerns
items.summary: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5, released publicly this week, sparked concerns about cybersecurity and hacking.
items.title_zh: Anthropic 因美国政府安全担忧暂停新的人工智能工具
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 的《克劳德寓言 5》本周公开发布，引发了人们对网络安全和黑客攻击的担忧。

items.title: With a Deal Seemingly Close, the U.S. Faces an Iran More Willing to Withstand Pressure
items.summary: The war has produced regime change, but Iran’s new leaders are more willing to take risks and believe they have already absorbed the worst that America and Israel can deliver.
items.title_zh: 协议看似接近，美国面临着更愿意承受压力的伊朗
items.summary_zh: 战争导致了政权更迭，但伊朗新领导人更愿意承担风险，并相信他们已经承受了美国和以色列所能带来的最糟糕的结果。

items.title: At the Canadian Screen Awards, the Industry Steps Outside Hollywood’s Shadow
items.summary: No longer content with being just “Hollywood North,” the Canadian screen industry is asserting itself and telling its own stories.
items.title_zh: 在加拿大银幕奖上，电影业走出了好莱坞的阴影
items.summary_zh: 加拿大电影业不再满足于“北方好莱坞”，而是坚持自己的主张并讲述自己的故事。

items.title: A Family Ravaged by Land Mines in Myanmar
items.summary: Bu Ri lost a leg to a mine in Myanmar decades ago. More recently, six other members of his family have suffered a similar fate or worse, in a sign of the devastation wreaked by civil war.
items.title_zh: 缅甸一个遭受地雷蹂躏的家庭
items.summary_zh: 几十年前，Bu Ri 在缅甸因地雷而失去了一条腿。最近，他的其他六名家人也遭受了类似的命运，甚至更糟，这是内战造成的破坏的迹象。

items.title: Should Switzerland Cap Its Population at 10 Million? Voters Will Decide.
items.summary: One of the world’s richest countries is about to hold a referendum on a measure that would curb migration and most likely the economy. It is being sold in warm tones.
items.title_zh: 瑞士是否应该将人口限制在 1000 万以内？选民将做出决定。
items.summary_zh: 世界上最富有的国家之一即将就一项限制移民和很可能限制经济的措施举行全民公投。它以暖色调出售。

items.title: VanEck bets BNB’s real-world usage can stand out in a crowded crypto ETF market
items.summary: VanEck says BNB’s user activity and revenue generation make it a stronger long-term crypto investment case than many blockchain projects still selling a vision.
items.title_zh: VanEck 押注 BNB 的实际使用可以在拥挤的加密 ETF 市场中脱颖而出
items.summary_zh: VanEck 表示，BNB 的用户活动和创收使其成为比许多仍在兜售愿景的区块链项目更强大的长期加密投资案例。

items.title: Appeals court rejects Sam Bankman-Fried’s bid for new trial in FTX fraud case
items.summary: Sam Bankman-Fried lost his appeal to overturn his 25-year sentence after accusing the original court of not giving him a fair chance.
items.title_zh: 上诉法院驳回 Sam Bankman-Fried 对 FTX 欺诈案重新审理的请求
items.summary_zh: 萨姆·班克曼-弗里德 (Sam Bankman-Fried) 指责原审法院没有给他公平的机会，因此上诉推翻了 25 年徒刑，但最终失败。

items.title: Ethena Labs to allocate $250 million to Securitize’s Tokenized AAA CLO Fund as it deploys on Solana
items.summary: STAC is one of Securitize’s in-house offerings that provides onchain access to institutional-grade, floating-rate structured credit.
items.title_zh: Ethena Labs 将向 Securitize 的代币化 AAA CLO 基金拨款 2.5 亿美元，以部署 Solana
items.summary_zh: STAC 是 Securitize 的内部产品之一，提供对机构级浮动利率结构性信贷的链上访问。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bittensor (TAO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #42.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Bittensor (TAO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 42 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: SpaceX xStock (SPCXX)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #727.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：SpaceX xStock (SPCXX)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#727。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #115.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 115 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Siren (SIREN)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #282.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：海妖 (SIREN)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 282 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Venice Token (VVV)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #79.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Venice Token (VVV)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 79 名。

items.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
items.summary: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.
items.title_zh: 支持欧洲确保值得信赖的人工智能生态系统的工作
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 支持欧盟关于人工智能内容透明度的实践准则，推进来源标准和工具以帮助人们理解人工智能生成的内容。

items.title: Jinhua Zhao named head of the Department of Urban Studies and Planning
items.summary: An expert in behavioral science and transportation, Zhao combines these studies with AI and public policy to address some of the most urgent challenges facing cities.
items.title_zh: 赵金华出任城市研究与规划系主任
items.summary_zh: 作为行为科学和交通领域的专家，赵将这些研究与人工智能和公共政策相结合，以解决城市面临的一些最紧迫的挑战。

items.title: The consequences of relying on AI for accurate news
items.summary: A Media Lab study shows that, much like how GPS has weakened our navigation skills, AI can make us worse at detecting fake news.
items.title_zh: 依靠人工智能获取准确新闻的后果
items.summary_zh: 媒体实验室的一项研究表明，就像 GPS 削弱了我们的导航技能一样，人工智能也会让我们更不擅长检测假新闻。

items.title: Teaching AI agents to ask better questions by playing “Battleship”
items.summary: MIT researchers use the classic game as a test bed for AI agents, finding a small AI model can outperform the biggest ones at 1 percent of the cost.
items.title_zh: 通过玩“战舰”来教人工智能代理提出更好的问题
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员使用这款经典游戏作为 AI 代理的测试平台，发现小型 AI 模型可以以 1% 的成本超越最大的模型。

items.title: Saylor to Musk: Thanks to you, 25% of 'Mag8' firms now hold bitcoin
items.summary: "Thanks to you, 25% of the Mag8 now holds bitcoin on the balance sheet," Saylor wrote on X, congratulating Musk on SpaceX's historic IPO debut.
items.title_zh: Saylor 对 Musk：多亏了你，25% 的“Mag8”公司现在持有比特币
items.summary_zh: Saylor 在 X 上写道：“多亏了你们，Mag8 25% 的员工现在在资产负债表上持有比特币。”他祝贺马斯克 SpaceX 历史性地首次公开募股。

items.title: Top cryptographers can't agree on Bitcoin's biggest quantum question
items.summary: A Coinbase-convened panel says Bitcoin should start preparing for quantum attacks now, but declines to take a position on whether millions of vulnerable coins, including many linked to Satoshi Nakamoto, should eventually be frozen.
items.title_zh: 顶级密码学家无法就比特币最大的量子问题达成一致
items.summary_zh: Coinbase 召集的一个小组表示，比特币现在应该开始为量子攻击做准备，但拒绝就是否应最终冻结数百万个易受攻击的代币（包括许多与中本聪有关的代币）采取立场。

items.title: Anthropic's pre-IPO shares fall as US government shuts down its most powerful AI model
items.summary: A jailbreak report prompted Washington to pull Fable 5 and Mythos 5 from all users. Anthropic complied but pushed back hard, saying the finding sets a standard that would halt the entire AI industry.
items.title_zh: 由于美国政府关闭其最强大的人工智能模型，Anthropic 的首次公开募股前股价下跌
items.summary_zh: 一份越狱报告促使华盛顿从所有用户中下架《神鬼寓言 5》和《神话 5》。 Anthropic 同意了，但强烈反驳，称这一发现设定了一个标准，将阻止整个人工智能行业的发展。

items.title: Bitcoin hit bottom at $59,000 marking end to the crypto winter, says Standard Chartered analyst
items.summary: Senior market analyst Geoffrey Kendrick pointed to the SpaceX IPO and a potential U.S.-Iran peace deal as the dual catalysts ending the recent crypto selloff.
items.title_zh: 渣打银行分析师表示，比特币跌至 59,000 美元底部，标志着加密货币冬天的结束
items.summary_zh: 高级市场分析师 Geoffrey Kendrick 指出 SpaceX IPO 和潜在的美伊和平协议是结束近期加密货币抛售的双重催化剂。

items.title: There is a ‘fundamental clash’ between bitcoin and institutionalization, says BTC circular economy project founder
items.summary: Bitcoin Ekasi's Hermann Vivier emphasized that bitcoin's store-of-value narrative does not exist without usage as a medium of exchange.
items.title_zh: BTC循环经济项目创始人表示，比特币与制度化之间存在“根本性冲突”
items.summary_zh: Bitcoin Ekasi 的 Hermann Vivier 强调，如果不用作交换媒介，比特币的价值存储叙述就不存在。

items.title: Access OpenAI models and Codex through your Oracle cloud commitment
items.summary: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.
items.title_zh: 通过 Oracle 云承诺访问 OpenAI 模型和 Codex
items.summary_zh: 通过 Oracle Cloud 访问 OpenAI 模型和 Codex，利用现有承诺构建和部署具有企业安全性和治理的 AI。

items.title: olmo-eval: An evaluation workbench for the model development loop
items.title_zh: olmo-eval：模型开发循环的评估工作台

items.title: Introducing North Mini Code: Cohere’s First Model For Developers
items.title_zh: North Mini Code 简介：Cohere 为开发人员提供的第一个模型

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Startup’s nuclear-inspired cooling system could make data centers more sustainable
items.summary: Founded by two researchers from MIT, Ferveret reduces the amount of energy and water required to cool the chips that power AI.
items.title_zh: 初创公司的核冷却系统可以使数据中心更具可持续性
items.summary_zh: Ferveret 由麻省理工学院的两名研究人员创立，可减少冷却人工智能芯片所需的能源和水量。

items.title: The crucial human component in computing and AI
items.summary: The MIT Ethics of Computing Research Symposium brought together experts and researchers working at the heart of ethical and social impact in technology.
items.title_zh: 计算和人工智能中至关重要的人类组成部分
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院计算机伦理研究研讨会汇集了从事技术伦理和社会影响核心工作的专家和研究人员。

items.title: NSF renews support for MIT-led AI and physics institute, expanding a new model for discovery
items.summary: IAIFI enters its second phase with increased funding, broader ambitions, and a growing community at the frontier of AI and fundamental physics.
items.title_zh: NSF 继续支持麻省理工学院领导的人工智能和物理研究所，拓展新的发现模式
items.summary_zh: IAIFI 进入第二阶段，资金增加、雄心勃勃，人工智能和基础物理学前沿社区不断壮大。

items.title: The S&P 500 already made a big call on SpaceX stock and index fund investors need to know it
items.summary: The S&P 500 index, where trillions in retirement savings are invested, said no to the SpaceX IPO, the biggest in history. Here's what that means for portfolios.
items.title_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数已经对 SpaceX 股票进行了重大看涨，指数基金投资者需要知道这一点
items.summary_zh: 投资了数万亿退休储蓄的标准普尔 500 指数对 SpaceX 的 IPO 表示拒绝，这是历史上规模最大的 IPO。这对于投资组合意味着什么。

items.title: SpaceX raising $75 billion in record-setting IPO as Nasdaq debut awaits
items.summary: SpaceX is selling 555.6 shares at $135 a piece, raising $75 billion in the largest IPO on record.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 在纳斯达克首次公开募股中筹集了 750 亿美元创纪录的资金
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 以每股 135 美元的价格出售 555.6 股股票，筹集了 750 亿美元的资金，这是有记录以来最大规模的 IPO。

items.title: SpaceX cuts retail IPO allocation to low 20% range, source says
items.summary: The Elon Musk-led company plans to direct a percentage in the low 20s of the offering to retail buyers, according to a person familiar with the matter.
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，SpaceX 将零售 IPO 分配削减至 20%
items.summary_zh: 据一位知情人士透露，这家由埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 领导的公司计划将 20% 左右的产品直接面向零售买家。

items.title: SpaceX to close above $2 trillion market cap on its debut, prediction market traders say
items.summary: Traders on Polymarket think it's likely SpaceX will join a group of just six companies with a market value beyond $2 trillion.
items.title_zh: 预测市场交易员表示，SpaceX 首次亮相时的收盘价将突破 2 万亿美元
items.summary_zh: Polymarket 的交易员认为 SpaceX 很可能会加入由六家公司组成、市值超过 2 万亿美元的行列。

items.title: North Carolina treasurer passes on SpaceX citing valuation concerns; favors OpenAI, Anthropic
items.summary: North Carolina has invested heavily in AI startups OpenAI and Anthropic while avoiding a direct stake in SpaceX.
items.title_zh: 北卡罗来纳州财长以估值担忧为由放弃了 SpaceX；支持 OpenAI、Anthropic
items.summary_zh: 北卡罗来纳州对人工智能初创公司 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 进行了大量投资，同时避免直接持有 SpaceX 的股份。

items.title: Switzerland to vote on plan to cap population at 10 million
items.summary: The right-wing Swiss People's Party calls the plan a "sustainability initiative", but opponents say it is a recipe for chaos.
items.title_zh: 瑞士将对人口限制在1000万的计划进行投票
items.summary_zh: 右翼瑞士人民党称该计划为“可持续发展倡议”，但反对者称这会引发混乱。

items.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
items.summary: Musk is now worth $1.11tn according to the Bloomberg rich list, while SpaceX listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange with a value of $2.2tn.
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 成为全球首位万亿富翁，SpaceX 首次上市股价飙升
items.summary_zh: 根据彭博社富豪榜，马斯克目前的身价为 1.11 万亿美元，而 SpaceX 在纳斯达克证券交易所上市的市值为 2.2 万亿美元。

items.title: Fans on concourses instead of in seats, claims Fifa
items.summary: Fifa says numerous empty seats were visible in the near-sell-out Group A match between South Korea and the Czech Republic because of fans remaining on concourses.
items.title_zh: 国际足联称球迷在大厅而不是座位上
items.summary_zh: 国际足联表示，在韩国队与捷克队之间的 A 组比赛中，观众席几乎全部售空，因为球迷们仍然留在大厅里，因此可以看到大量空座位。

items.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in airstrike, Trump says
items.summary: Niño Guerrero was killed in a "swift and lethal kinetic strike," the US President wrote in a social media post.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称美国在空袭中击毙了委内瑞拉特伦·德·阿拉瓜帮派头目
items.summary_zh: 美国总统在社交媒体帖子中写道，尼诺·格雷罗在“迅速而致命的动能袭击”中丧生。

items.title: King leads tributes to 'giant of the art world' David Hockney
items.summary: The artist, who has died at the age of 88, "was one of life's true originals", King Charles says.
items.title_zh: 金领导向“艺术界巨人”大卫·霍克尼致敬
items.summary_zh: 查尔斯国王说，这位去世享年 88 岁的艺术家“是生命的真正原创者之一”。

items.title: French town buries murdered child as questions mount over police failings
items.summary: The prime suspect in the killing of Lyhanna, 11, was reported to police nine months prior but never questioned.
items.title_zh: 法国小镇埋葬被害儿童，警方失职引发质疑
items.summary_zh: 杀害 11 岁莱哈娜的主要嫌疑人在九个月前向警方报案，但从未受到讯问。

items.title: Russia Is Rich in Ballistic Missiles. Ukraine Is Short of Ways to Stop Them.
items.summary: Ukraine is running out of American-made Patriot air-defense interceptors, and is pleading for more.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯拥有丰富的弹道导弹。乌克兰缺乏阻止他们的方法。
items.summary_zh: 乌克兰的美国制造的爱国者防空拦截器即将耗尽，并恳求提供更多。

items.title: A Tren de Aragua Leader Is Killed in a Joint Strike, U.S. and Venezuela Say
items.summary: A strike this week in Venezuela killed a gang leader known as Niño Guerrero who was wanted in the United States, officials in both countries said.
items.title_zh: 美国和委内瑞拉称特伦德阿拉瓜领导人在联合袭击中丧生
items.summary_zh: 两国官员表示，本周委内瑞拉的一次袭击导致一名被美国通缉的黑帮头目尼诺·格雷罗身亡。

items.title: Brazilians Revive a World Cup Ritual to Cheer on Their National Team
items.summary: After years of dampened enthusiasm about the World Cup, Brazilians are excited about their national team again — and they’re showing it by painting the streets.
items.title_zh: 巴西人重拾世界杯仪式为国家队加油
items.summary_zh: 经过多年对世界杯的热情低迷后，巴西人再次对自己的国家队感到兴奋——他们通过在街道上绘画来表达这一点。

items.title: What to Know About the Ebola Outbreak
items.summary: Aid agencies are racing to help health workers in the Democratic Republic of Congo. The virus is known to have killed at least 140 people, but the true toll may be far higher.
items.title_zh: 关于埃博拉疫情需要了解什么
items.summary_zh: 援助机构正在竞相帮助刚果民主共和国的卫生工作者。据了解，该病毒已导致至少 140 人死亡，但真实死亡人数可能要高得多。

items.title: U.S. Plan Is Said to Pull a Third of Fighter Jets It Provides NATO for Europe
items.summary: The plan, outlined by officials and in a written document, provides rare clarity about the extent to which the Trump administration intends to reduce its commitment to NATO.
items.title_zh: 据说美国计划将向欧洲提供北约三分之一的战斗机
items.summary_zh: 官员们在一份书面文件中概述了该计划，罕见地明确了特朗普政府打算在多大程度上减少对北约的承诺。

items.title: Crypto should adopt the best of centralization, says LMAX CEO
items.summary: As digital assets mature the industry should borrow more from traditional market infrastructure, especially credit, clearing and collateral systems, David Mercer argues.
items.title_zh: LMAX 首席执行官表示，加密货币应该采用最好的中心化方式
items.summary_zh: David Mercer 认为，随着数字资产的成熟，该行业应该更多地借鉴传统市场基础设施，特别是信贷、清算和抵押系统。

items.title: Ripple wants AI agents to pay in XRP and RLUSD. The market is still mostly USDC
items.summary: The XRPL AI Starter Kit gives developers tools for agent payments, but early x402 activity has clustered on Base and Solana. Ripple’s bet is that XRPL’s speed, low fees and RLUSD can win a piece of that flow.
items.title_zh: Ripple 希望 AI 代理以 XRP 和 RLUSD 支付。市场仍以 USDC 为主
items.summary_zh: XRPL AI 入门套件为开发人员提供了代理付款工具，但早期的 x402 活动主要集中在 Base 和 Solana 上。 Ripple 的赌注是 XRPL 的速度、低廉的费用和 RLUSD 可以赢得这一流量的一部分。

items.title: SpaceX IPO scramble reveals difference between tokenizing a stock and getting one
items.summary: Crypto platforms promised early access to the blockbuster SpaceX IPO through tokenized shares. The problem wasn't technology, but getting the actual stock.
items.title_zh: SpaceX IPO 争夺揭示了股票代币化和获得股票之间的区别
items.summary_zh: 加密平台承诺通过代币化股票提前参与 SpaceX 的 IPO。问题不在于技术，而在于获取实际库存。

items.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX soars 20% in blockbuster Nasdaq debut
items.summary: The stock was trading above $160 in volatile action after last night's IPO at $135.
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 在纳斯达克上市，股价飙升 20%
items.summary_zh: 在昨晚以 135 美元的价格首次公开募股后，该股的交易价格在 160 美元以上波动。

items.title: CFTC sues New Mexico in latest bid to assert authority over sports betting markets
items.summary: New Mexico is the next state in the CFTC's crosshairs as the fight continues over regulatory jurisdiction over sports betting.
items.title_zh: CFTC 起诉新墨西哥州，以维护对体育博彩市场的权威
items.summary_zh: 随着体育博彩监管管辖权之争仍在继续，新墨西哥州成为商品期货交易委员会关注的下一个州。

items.title: Former SEC Chair Gensler rejects CFTC claim of authority over prediction market sports betting
items.summary: Gary Gensler is calling malarkey the claim that the CFTC has jurisdiction over prediction markets, specifically sports bets.
items.title_zh: SEC 前主席 Gensler 拒绝 CFTC 声称对预测市场体育博彩拥有权威
items.summary_zh: 加里·詹斯勒 (Gary Gensler) 称 CFTC 对预测市场（特别是体育博彩）拥有管辖权的说法是胡言乱语。

items.title: Early Airbnb, DoorDash backer Y Combinator says Clarity Act could bring crypto to ‘every’ portfolio company
items.summary: Also a backer of companies like Coinbase, OpenAI, Stripe, Reddit, OpenAI and Kalshi, Y Combinator wants to see Congress pass the CLARITY Act.
items.title_zh: Airbnb 和 DoorDash 的早期支持者 Y Combinator 表示，Clarity Act 可以为“每家”投资组合公司带来加密货币
items.summary_zh: Y Combinator 也是 Coinbase、OpenAI、Stripe、Reddit、OpenAI 和 Kalshi 等公司的支持者，希望看到国会通过 CLARITY 法案。

items.title: Bybit, Binance, Bitget cancel tokenized SpaceX IPO allocations after share shortage
items.summary: All three providers are issuing full refunds and additional compensation to affected users.
items.title_zh: 股票短缺后，Bybit、Binance、Bitget 取消了 SpaceX 代币化 IPO 分配
items.summary_zh: 所有三个提供商都向受影响的用户提供全额退款和额外补偿。

items.title: South Korea finance ministry says tokenized stocks are securities, not crypto assets, opening door to taxes: report
items.summary: South Korea’s finance ministry said tokenized stocks are securities, opening potential taxation as early as H2 2026 if regulators agree.
items.title_zh: 韩国财政部表示，代币化股票是证券，而不是加密资产，这为税收敞开了大门：报告
items.summary_zh: 韩国财政部表示，代币化股票属于证券，如果监管机构同意，最早将于 2026 年下半年开始征税。

items.title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
items.summary: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.
items.title_zh: 面向下一个工作时代的新 OpenAI Academy 课程
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出了三门学院课程，帮助人们培养实用的人工智能技能、创建可重复的工作流程以及在日常工作中应用代理。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Ona
items.summary: OpenAI plans to acquire Ona to expand Codex with secure, persistent cloud environments, enabling long-running AI agents across enterprise workflows.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 Ona
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 计划收购 Ona，以通过安全、持久的云环境扩展 Codex，从而实现跨企业工作流程长期运行的 AI 代理。

items.title: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes
items.summary: Discover how astrophysicist Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations, helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity.
items.title_zh: 天体物理学家如何使用 Codex 帮助模拟黑洞
items.summary_zh: 了解天体物理学家 Chi-kwan Chan 如何使用 Codex 构建黑洞模拟，帮助科学家研究极端物理学并测试爱因斯坦的广义相对论。

items.title: PRC-linked influence operations are targeting AI debates in the US
items.summary: A new report from OpenAI details PRC-linked influence operations using AI to target U.S. tech debates, data center narratives, tariffs, and false claims about ChatGPT.
items.title_zh: 与中国相关的影响力行动瞄准了美国的人工智能辩论

items.title: From data to decisions: how LSEG is scaling trusted AI
items.summary: See how LSEG uses OpenAI to scale trusted AI across its global business, accelerating insights, shrinking release cycles, and empowering 4,000 employees.
